title: Rachel Cristofoli
content:
People.ContactEmail rcristofoli@mccarthy.ca
- Osgoode Hall Law School
Rachel is an associate in our Business Law Group in Toronto. She maintains a general corporate and commercial practice, with experience in mergers and acquisitions, capital markets and corporate finance. She has assisted both public and private clients across multiple industries, including private equity, mining, consumer products, and infrastructure.
Rachel was a summer student with McCarthy Tétrault in 2023 and completed her articles with the firm in 2025. During her time as an articling student, Rachel undertook a secondment at Nestlé Canada Inc., where she supported the legal department in regulatory compliance and contract negotiations.
She received her law degree from Osgoode Hall Law School and her MBA with a specialization in Finance from the Schulich School of Business as part of the joint JD/MBA program. While at Osgoode, she served as Vice President of the JD/MBA Students' Association and worked with the Osgoode Venture Capital Clinic, where she assisted startups on corporate and financing matters.
Prior to law school, Rachel earned a Bachelor of Arts in Industrial Relations from McGill University. She was called to the Ontario bar in 2025 and is an active member of the Law Society of Ontario.
